page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4r.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, meaning hyperthreading is disabled. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance includes 1919 GB of bundled local SSD storage, making it suitable for applications requiring fast local read and write access. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps. The underlying virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor, and no complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this configuration.

Given the 1:8 core-to-memory ratio and the integrated local SSD storage, the ecs.i4r.8xlarge is designed for memory-intensive workloads and database applications. It is well-suited for hosting relational databases, NoSQL databases, in-memory caches, and data processing pipelines. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention, representing a high-density hardware profile optimized for sustained enterprise workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4r.8xlarge is an x86_64 server instance configured with 32 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance features a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, ensuring that each core runs a single dedicated thread without hyperthreading. It provides 256.0 GB of system memory, establishing an 8.0 GB memory-to-core ratio. The hardware configuration includes 1919 GB of local SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. With no integrated GPU and a fully dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is optimized for workloads requiring high memory capacity and fast local storage. It is highly suitable for database hosting, in-memory caching, and data processing tasks that benefit from dedicated compute resources and high-density memory configurations.

tagline: A dedicated x86_64 server featuring high memory density, local SSD storage, and thirty-two physical Intel Xeon cores for database workloads.
